issues.title: Add user authentication module
issues.description:
Implement a user authentication module with login/logout functionality.

## Requirements
- Support username/password authentication
- Generate JWT tokens on successful login
- Provide logout endpoint to invalidate tokens

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] POST /auth/login accepts username and password
- [ ] Returns JWT token on success
- [ ] POST /auth/logout invalidates the token

issues.title: Create database connection pool
issues.description:
Set up a connection pool for PostgreSQL database.

## Requirements
- Use pgx driver
- Configure pool size via environment variable
- Implement health check endpoint

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Connection pool initialized on startup
- [ ] Configurable via DB_POOL_SIZE env var
- [ ] /health endpoint returns pool status

issues.title: Add API rate limiting
issues.description:
Implement rate limiting middleware for the API.

## Requirements
- Use sliding window algorithm
- Configure rate per IP address
- Return 429 Too Many Requests when exceeded

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Middleware applied to all API routes
- [ ] Configurable rate limit (default 100/min)
- [ ] Proper 429 response with Retry-After header
